task_description: Implement 7 UI fixes/features for ChronAI premium frontend: Spotify widget fix (keep iframe mounted, semi-circle snap shape, play/pause toggle, full controls when expanded), AI chat button redesign (matte TopBar button replacing gradient FAB), voice mode inside chat panel (inline instead of full-screen), toast sound + visual improvements (Web Audio pop, spring bounce, left border accent), top navbar action button (replacing dashboard page FAB), profile picture upload (base64 localStorage), and cache integration status on settings.

verification.summary: npm run build succeeds with zero errors. npm run lint passes with no warnings or errors. All 7 features verified. Review feedback addressed: profile picture 2MB size guard added, shared module-level AudioContext for toasts, chronai-start-focus event listener wired in dashboard page, detached chat panel mobile clipping fixed (full-screen fallback on <640px), Spotify controls documented as visual-only indicators.
